meaning: not provided for 未作规定
examples: Objective Comparing the examination of velopharyngeal function of normal phonation using CT and nasopharyngofiberscope (NPF).
Methods Examination and comparison the velopharyngeal types and velopharyngeal insufficiency rates of 10 patients with normal phonation using CT and NPF.
In state estimation of satellite attitude determination, both traditional extended Kalman filter (EKF) and the proposed nonlinear predictive filter (NPF) have their own merits and defects.
At present local parties elect 54 of the NPF's 175 members, on a regional basis.
Conference has yet to reject a proposal put to it by the NPF.
